params.text:
opencode gateway [demo]
workdir: /tmp/demo

mode: compact (final output only)
commands: /repos, /status, /models, /session, /version, /revert, /unrevert, /test, /restart, /reset, /init, /verbose on, /verbose off, /whereami

Send any prompt to run opencode.
